creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #1)

The main issue with the review was that I started with samba46 as the base for the copy and not samba47. As it currently stands the version in the review builds and the options work. Considering that it's a carbon copy of the previous samba47 port except the pkg-plist and dependency bumps, "so many things wrong" is a gross exaggeration of the situation.

You seem to have an inability to cooperate with others in the project. I will remind you that you do not own any port in the FreeBSD ports tree and if you find it too difficult to work with others you're welcome to walk away from the project entirely.
